purpose: Series-level rolling-window tracker for NBA playoff postmortems, LiveFlow entries, edge calls, misses, and patch requirements.

folder_map.note: Game 1 PHI_NYK and MIN_SAS postmortems were confirmed by user screenshot inside nba_postmortems, so the index now points to that folder for those files.

rolling_window_weighting_notes: Game 1 blowout should be deweighted due to PHI road fatigue after one day rest following Game 7 vs BOS.
Game 2 validated PHI competitiveness without Embiid: 25 lead changes, 14 ties, no team led by more than seven.
Primary forward-looking flags: Embiid injury status, OG Anunoby late-game exit, Brunson close-game margin expansion, KAT late rebound stabilizer.

games.rolling_window_use: Context only; apply blowout deweighting due to PHI rest/fatigue disadvantage.
games.index_correction: Previously pointed to Backtest_Logbook/NBA/2026-05-04_PHI_NYK_Game1_Postmortem.json as pending. Corrected to nba_postmortems folder path shown by user.

games.rolling_window_use: High-weight Game 3 input; close-game mechanics and Embiid-out rotation effects are more predictive than Game 1 margin.

rolling_window_weighting_notes: Game 1 showed Minnesota could steal road home-court through Randle/Gobert/Naz rebound channels and Spurs cold top-two shooting.
Game 2 showed San Antonio response profile: Wembanyama/Fox attack-mode, transition avalanche, Minnesota offensive collapse, and blowout bench scoring risk.
Primary forward-looking flags: Edwards minutes restriction, Randle rebound minutes compression, Spurs Game 2 home-favorite response, garbage-time total over spike.

games.rolling_window_use: Use rebound tracking inputs, but cap confidence where Game 2 blowout minutes risk is possible.
games.index_correction: Previously pointed to Backtest_Logbook/NBA/2026-05-04_MIN_SAS_Game1_Postmortem.json as pending. Corrected to nba_postmortems folder path shown by user.

games.rolling_window_use: High-weight Game 3 input for blowout-risk detection and Spurs pace/transition response; low-weight for normal competitive total projections due to garbage-time distortion.

series.current_series_state: OKC leads 1-0 at time of logged Game 1 file

games.rolling_window_use: Track Lakers offensive suppression without Luka and OKC margin control profile.

series.current_series_state: DET leads 1-0 at time of logged Game 1 file

games.rolling_window_use: Track Detroit turnover pressure and Cavs late-game response profile.

active_patch_queue.trigger: Spread expands beyond 20 by halftime or 28 by end of 3Q; downgrade rebound overs and starter-dependent props.
Blowout plus bench 3PA rate and low defensive resistance; reduce confidence in full-game live unders.
Knicks live spread inside 5 in playoff 4Q with Brunson on floor and opposing closer fatigue detected.
Prior blowout caused by opponent short-rest/fatigue disadvantage after Game 7.

workflow_rule: Every finalized NBA postmortem should be registered either from the active nba_postmortems folder or the standard Backtest_Logbook/NBA folder, then indexed inside this rolling-window series file for forward Game N+1 forecasting.
